name: Nonrecognition of Gain on Subsidiary Liquidation

eligibility.description: The parent corporation must own at least 80% of the total voting power and value of the subsidiary's stock as defined in section 332(b).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Prevents the recognition of gain or loss by a liquidating subsidiary corporation when it distributes property to its 80-percent parent corporation.
